page: Microsoft Azure F32ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Fadsv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz, with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. Memory capacity is configured at 128.0 GB of RAM, providing 4.0 GB per core. It includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage.

In benchmark testing, the F32ads_v7 demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng single-core and gzip compression. Multi-core performance is strong, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU tests. The system also excels in database operations, with PassMark database benchmarks scoring in the top 10%, complemented by strong memory bandwidth and high static web serving throughput.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-capacity local storage, this server is highly cost-efficient for resource-dense workloads that require rapid local disk access without the overhead of external storage. It is well-suited for relational databases, web serving, multi-threaded decompression tasks, and moderate-scale language model inference, where its top-tier prompt processing and text generation speeds for smaller models can be fully leveraged.
description: Microsoft Azure F32ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Fadsv7 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 4.5 GHz. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 3780 GB of local storage, this instance offers a balanced 1:4 memory-to-vCPU ratio. Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core CPU performance and database operations, alongside strong multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth. The server is optimized for workloads requiring high-speed local storage and robust compute capacity, such as database management, web serving, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F32ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, delivering top-tier database and single-core performance.

tagline: A balanced 32-core AMD EPYC virtual machine featuring high-speed local storage and top-tier database and single-core processing performance.

128.0 GB RAM providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio
